title: senecio chrysanthus
intro: Senecio chrysanthus, also known as the Easter bonnet or golden groundsel, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that grows to a height of about 15-30 cm. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Senecio chrysanthus include its ability to soothe coughs, ease bronchitis symptoms, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infused in hot water as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
